useThisUrlToShareYourOfferWithOtherPeopl: Use this url to share your offer with other people!

renew.closingMessageRenewalScreen: Protecting your vehicle is important to us. If you ever change your mind in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out - we’ll be here to help.
renew.contractsExpiringRenewalScreen: Ok, great! Let's review what is expiring soon and see what replacement options are available:
renew.introRenewalScreen: Hi, {customerFirstName} 👋 This is {managerFirstName} from {dealerName}. We hope you're doing well and that your {carBrand} has been providing you with an exceptional ownership experience. As your trusted dealer, we want to make you aware that one or more of your vehicle protection plans are about to expire and can be renewed now with no credit check, interest-free, and financing options.
renew.doYouStillOwnThisVehicle: Do you still own this vehicle?
renew.mileageRenewalScreen: Great! To make sure we provide you with the most accurate and up-to-date options, could you please share your vehicle's current mileage?
renew.newVehicleRenewalScreen: Okay, thanks. We will make sure we update our records accordingly. If you haven't found a replacement vehicle yet, we have both new and used available onsite that we would love to show you!
renew.visitSchedulingRenewalScreen: Great! We will reach out to schedule a visit to {name}! Thanks for taking the time to talk with us, we look forward to you coming in!
reconsider.introReconsiderScreen: Hi {customerFirstName} 👋, this is {managerFirstName} from {dealerName}. As the {managerTitle}, I wanted to personally thank you for choosing us for your recent vehicle purchase.
reconsider.introReconsiderScreenDescript: When you purchased your vehicle, we reviewed a protection plan that you chose not to add at the time. It’s designed to help cover unexpected repair costs. Similar coverage is still available - giving you peace of mind and protection when you need it most.
resultsProvidedInTheCalculatorAreForInfo: Results provided in the calculator are for informational purposes only.
customerForm.emailExplanation: Email will be used to send documents and information about your order.
addYourInformationDescription: Please fill in form below. This information will be used to process your order.
failedUpdateItemToCartPleaseTryAgain: Failed to update item in cart. Please try again.
signTheContractDescription: Failing to sign the contract may invalidate your future claims. Please check your email for the link to sign the contract.
errorSigningContract: Error signing contract. Please refresh your page to try again.
addingDifferentVinDisclaimer: Viewing prices with a different VIN will clear your cart
claimsDescriptionAmount: According to your vehicle's repair history, your vehicle had {repairsAmount} repairs that were covered under this protection plan for a total cost of {totalCost}.
